parts.text: Analyzing the speech for populist elements...

{"score":0.1,"explanation":"The speech is a valedictory address heavily focused on institutional pluralism and incremental reform.","populist":{"category_1":"","category_2":"","category_3":"Growing up in poorer working-class suburbs.","category_4":"The promises broken by successive Governments.","category_5":"","category_6":""},"non_populist":{"category_1":"Currently, there are 38 women in this Parliament.","category_2":"Suicide prevention and drug abuse prevention.","category_3":"The poll trends indicated Labour would get no votes.","category_4":"I pay tribute to Helen Clark.","category_5":"One bad day in Government is better than a thousand good days in Opposition.","category_6":"I also pay tribute to parliamentary staff."}}
